title: rubus doyonensis
intro: Rubus doyonensis, also known as Doyon raspberry or Doyon wild raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant is native to Alaska, and its medicinal properties include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus doyonensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal uses.
